artPrompt: The dramatic instant of an obsessive recount: a pair of disembodied hands hover over a tumbling six-sided die and spinning coin frozen mid-air, surrounded by ghostly duplicate dice stacked upward in a dizzying cyan spiral, each one being counted again and again. Beige filing cabinets blur behind. The endless tally climbs the wide frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, faint arcane glow, oppressive stillness, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Recount of the Recount
text:
Choose target die roll or coin flip that happened this turn. Recount it. Then, because the recount is suspicious, recount the recount. The final result is whichever outcome you, personally, prefer.
Draw a card. (For your records.)
flavorText: The Mayor demanded a recount. Prim demanded a recount of his recount. They are now on recount nine.
